content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PREPOSITION + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a limited range of prepositional verbs followed by noun or pronoun objects.
chinese_human_name: 介词动词基础用法：动词+介词+宾语
examples: I listen to music in the living room, and also eat my breakfast, lunch and dinner.、I can look after her if she needs to do shopping and cleaning.、I like to walk in the woods and look for mushrooms.
keywords: 介词动词,固定搭配,动词+介词,宾语,日常表达

content: Guideword: FORM: AUXILIARY VERB 'BE'. CanDo: Can use auxiliary verb 'be'. ►  present continuous
chinese_human_name: 助动词be的现在进行时用法
examples: I am writing to tell you what I do every day at college.、I'm working today.、We are going to the park.
keywords: 助动词be,现在进行时,动词-ing形式,进行时态,be动词变化

content: Guideword: FORM: MODAL AUXILIARY VERBS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of modal auxiliary verbs ('can', 'will', 'would').
chinese_human_name: 情态助动词基础：can, will, would的用法
examples: Can you bring some music with you to the dinner.、I'll be very happy to help you.、I would like to eat some Spanish food.
keywords: 情态助动词,can,will,would,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: LINKING VERB, 'BE'. CanDo: Can use linking verb 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 系动词be的基本用法：描述状态与特征
examples: I am 22 years old.、There are 4 rooms.、And I like my home because it's not too big and it's a very nice flat.、It was very nice.
trigger_lemmas: be happy、be a student、be in、be at
keywords: 系动词,be动词,主语一致,表语,缩写形式

content: Guideword: FORM: MAIN VERBS. CanDo: Can use regular and irregular main verbs in simple verb phrases. ► present simple ► past simple
chinese_human_name: 主要动词基础用法：规则与不规则动词在一般现在时和一般过去时中的运用
examples: You know, I love your cooking!、I have very good friends.、She comes from India.、She has long, dark hair and brown eyes.、He gets up at 6 o'clock and goes to work.、I heard from our neighbours about you.、My grandmother lived in a village and I often went there.
trigger_lemmas: get up、go to work、come from、have friends
keywords: 主要动词,规则动词,不规则动词,一般现在时,一般过去时,动词短语

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + 'TO'-INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use a limited range of verbs followed by a 'to'- infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词后接to不定式：基础用法
examples: I like to go to the zoo.、Sometimes I don't like to go out because It's very cold.、I want to invite you for dinner.
keywords: to不定式,动词原形,like to,want to,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM: 'WOULD LIKE TO'. CanDo: Can use 'would like to' + infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 礼貌表达意愿：would like to + 动词原形
examples: I would like to meet you to give you some information about the Brannl State and the shops near her.、I'd like to invite you on Sunday about six o'clock in the evening.
trigger_lemmas: would like to、i'd like to、would you like to
keywords: would like to,动词原形,礼貌表达,不定式,邀请句型

content: Guideword: FORM: 'LIKE' + 'TO'-INFINITIVE OR + '-ING'. CanDo: Can use 'like' followed either by a 'to'-infinitive or an '-ing' form, with no change in meaning.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词like的两种用法：like to do与like doing
examples: I like to work with my teacher.、I don't like to eat at College.、I like reading lots of magazines.、I don't like doing homework in college.、I like learning grammar.、I like travelling by car.
trigger_lemmas: like to、like doing、don't like to、doesn't like doing
keywords: like,to-infinitive,gerund,动名词,不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THERE IS'. CanDo: Can use 'there is' + singular noun phrase as complement.
chinese_human_name: 存在句型：there is + 单数名词短语
examples: My home is nice, there is a nice garden.、In my College there is a big library.、In my home there are two bedrooms, there's a kitchen, there's a bathroom and a living-room.
keywords: there is,单数名词,存在句型,地点状语,there's

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THERE ARE'. CanDo: Can use 'there are' + plural noun phrase as complement.
chinese_human_name: 存在句型：there are + 复数名词短语
examples: There are two bathrooms.、There are many shops and schools.、I think, in the park there are animals.
keywords: there are,复数名词,存在句型,地点状语,主谓一致

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE' + COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can use linking verb 'be' with complements.
chinese_human_name: 系动词'be'的基本用法：描述状态与身份
examples: Because today is my birthday.、Martin is from Poland.、My house is very clean.
keywords: 系动词,补语,be动词,主语,状态描述

content: Guideword: FORM: MODAL VERBS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of modal verbs + subject + main verb to form 'yes/no' questions.  ► can
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can构成的一般疑问句
examples: Can you come to dinner in my house?、I can't find my CD, can you bring some music please?
keywords: 情态动词,一般疑问句,动词原形,can,主语

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) QUESTIONS WITH 'BE'. CanDo: Can use the pronouns 'you' and 'it' after 'be' in question forms.
chinese_human_name: 疑问句中使用'be'动词搭配代词'you'和'it'
examples: Hi, Mrs. Bishop. How are you? (Skills for Life (Entry 1); ; A1 BREAKTHROUGH; 2009; Tagalog; Pass)、Is it OK? (Skills for Life (Entry 1); ; A1 BREAKTHROUGH; 2009; Romanian; Pass)
keywords: be动词,疑问句,代词,主语,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: (OBJECT) 'IT'. CanDo: Can use the pronoun 'it' as a direct object to refer to an object or situation already referred to.
chinese_human_name: 代词it作直接宾语：指代已提及的事物或情况
examples: The maths is boring and I don't like it. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Portuguese)、If you can't find it, call me. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Turkish)、Do you like it too? (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; German)
keywords: 代词it,直接宾语,指代,单数,及物动词

content: Guideword: FORM: (OBJECT) WITH PREPOSITION. CanDo: Can use the object pronouns 'me', 'you', 'him', 'her', 'it', 'us' and 'them' in the object position after prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 介词后的宾语代词：me, you, him, her, it, us, them
examples: I really like to learn new words. It's very important for me. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Polish)、Sometimes I go with her. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Polish)、Can you bring some music so we can listen to it. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; no L1 specified)、I spend my free time with them. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Lithuanian)
keywords: 宾语代词,介词,主语代词,词序,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the pronouns 'I', 'you', 'we' and 'they' after an auxiliary or modal verb in question forms.
chinese_human_name: 主语代词在疑问句中的用法：I, you, we, they
examples: Can I help you? (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Arabic – other)、What do you think about that? (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; French)、Can we have a chat? (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Russian)
trigger_lemmas: can i、do you、can we、what do you
keywords: 主语代词,疑问句,助动词,情态动词,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: (OBJECT) 'ME', 'YOU', 'HER', 'HIM', 'US', 'THEM'. CanDo: Can use the pronouns 'me', 'you', 'him', 'her', 'us' and 'them' in the direct object position after a transitive verb.
chinese_human_name: 英语代词宾格：me, you, him, her, us, them的用法
examples: I'm very happy that you want to see me. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; German)、I can see her on Saturday at 8 pm. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Arabic)、It protects us from rain, wind and sun. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Portuguese)、You will find a lot of different shops … I hope you'll like them. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Russian)
keywords: 宾格代词,及物动词,宾语位置,代词变化,动作接受者

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) 'IT' FOR FIRST PERSON. CanDo: Can use the pronoun 'it' before 'be' to refer to a first person speaker or writer.
chinese_human_name: 代词'it'用于第一人称介绍：It's + 人名/身份
examples: Hello Mrs Bishop. It's Clarisse (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; French)、Dear Cris, it's me, Paarth.
keywords: 代词it,第一人称,自我介绍,be动词,非正式用语

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) STATEMENTS. CanDo: Can use the pronouns 'I', 'you', 'he', 'she', 'it', 'we' and 'they' in the subject position before a verb in statements.
chinese_human_name: 主语代词在陈述句中的用法：I, you, he, she, it, we, they
examples: In my free time I go shopping and I like swimming. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Polish)、If you want, you can go inside. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Hindi)、He prefers chess. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Singhalese)、My friend's name is Julissa, she is from Ecuador and she lives near my home. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Spanish)、I like my home because it is a beautiful home. It has a big garden and a good sitting room. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Pashto)、I like my front garden because it's very nice and warm. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Czech)、They're nice people. (Skills for Life (Entry 1); A1; Arabic)
trigger_lemmas: i go、you can、he is、she likes、it has、we are、they live
keywords: 主语代词,陈述句,词序,指代,动词前位置

content: Guideword: FORM: OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a limited range of indefinite pronouns as objects.

examples: I like doing everything at College because I love my college …、I like to eat everything.、I can clean your house and cook something for you.、If you need anything, please let me know.
keywords: 不定代词,宾语,everything,something,anything

examples: I hope everything is all right.、[talking about the countryside] Everything is nice and green there.

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时肯定形式：描述正在进行的动作
examples: I am sending you some flowers, because you are not well.、I am writing to tell you what I do every day at college.

content: Guideword: USE: EVENTS IN PROGRESS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a limited range of verbs to talk about situations and events in progress.

examples: [in a message to someone who is ill] We are missing you.、I am sending you these flowers because I think that you will like these pretty flowers and you will get well soon.、I really like it when we are doing more speaking.

examples: I work in a supermarket.、I like my place because it is quiet, the people are nice, it is near the town centre, not too far from the college and my flat is lovely.、It takes 25 minutes by car, but by bus it takes 1 hour …、I watch TV in the evening. I read books at night.、She goes to work by bus.

content: Guideword: FORM: PROPER NOUNS. CanDo: Can use proper nouns with a capital letter to refer to specific people, places, days and things.

content: Guideword: USE: OFFERS. CanDo: Can use 'can' to make an offer.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can：用于提出帮助或建议
examples: Can I help you?、What can I do for you?、How can I help you?、If you want, I can come to your house and I can help you with for example some housework on Sunday this weekend.
keywords: 情态动词,提出帮助,Can I,动词原形,礼貌询问

content: Guideword: USE: ABILITY. CanDo: Can use 'can' to talk about ability to do something.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can：表达能力
examples: I can cook.、I can write English.、[talking about someone with a physical disability] He cannot go up stairs.、[talking about reading in English] I can’t read very well.
keywords: 情态动词,能力表达,动词原形,肯定否定形式,日常技能

content: Guideword: USE: REQUESTS. CanDo: Can use 'can' to make a request.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can：礼貌请求的用法
examples: Can you come on Sunday at seven o’clock?、Can you call me?
keywords: 情态动词,can,请求,礼貌用语,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: POSSIBILITY. CanDo: Can use 'can' to talk about possibility.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can：表示可能性
examples: The shop is next to the post office. There you can find milk, juices and sweets but you can't buy meat.、I cannot see you today.、I'm sorry I can't see you now because I am very busy at work.
keywords: 情态动词,可能性,can,动词原形,否定形式

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will的肯定形式：表达未来意愿和计划
examples: I will be at your house at 7.30 because I have an appointment before.、I'll come to see you tomorrow morning.
keywords: 情态动词,未来时态,动词原形,时间状语,缩写形式

content: Guideword: USE: PLANS AND INTENTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'will' to talk about plans and intentions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：表达计划和意图
examples: I will bring some music to the dinner.、I'll see you tomorrow.
keywords: 情态动词,未来时,计划和意图,动词原形,缩写’ll

content: Guideword: USE: INVITATIONS WITH 'LIKE'. CanDo: Can use 'would like to invite' to make invitations.
chinese_human_name: 邀请表达：would like to invite
examples: I would like to invite you to dinner in my house on Saturday at 7 30 pm.、Dear Neighbours, I would like to invite you to my home for dinner.
trigger_lemmas: would like to invite、invite to、like to invite
keywords: would like,invite,礼貌邀请,正式表达,不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE WITH 'LIKE'. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with 'like'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would的肯定式：would like to的用法
examples: I'd like to invite you to dinner.、I would like to eat some Spanish food.
trigger_lemmas: would like to、i'd like to、would you like to
keywords: would like to,情态动词,肯定式,礼貌请求,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: WISHES AND PREFERENCES WITH 'LIKE'. CanDo: Can use 'would like' to talk about wishes and preferences.
chinese_human_name: 表达愿望与偏好的句型：would like
examples: If possible, I'd like to come to see you on Tuesday afternoon.、I would like to eat chicken, potatoes and some vegetables.
trigger_lemmas: would like、would like to、would you like
keywords: would like,愿望,偏好,礼貌请求,动词不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE 'WILL'. CanDo: Can use the affirmative forms 'will' and ''ll'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 一般将来时肯定式：will和'll的用法
examples: I will see you soon.、I'll come at 7 o'clock.
keywords: 一般将来时,will,'ll,动词原形,将来时态

content: Guideword: USE: PLANS AND INTENTIONS WITH 'WILL'. CanDo: Can use 'will' and ''ll' to talk about plans and intentions.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 一般将来时：用will表达计划和意图
examples: I will try to come to see you tomorrow.、I'll bring a football ball with me.
keywords: 一般将来时,will,计划,意图,即时决定

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH NOUNS. CanDo: Can use articles 'the', 'a' and 'an' before nouns. ► noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 冠词基础用法：the、a、an与名词搭配
examples: She lives in a small flat in the town - it's great!、I have an appointment with my G.P. at 5.45 pm.
keywords: 冠词,定冠词,不定冠词,名词短语,特指与泛指

content: Guideword: FORM: 'A' + 'VERY' + ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use 'a' + 'very' + adjectives in basic noun phrases. ► adverbs ►  noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 基础名词短语：'a very + 形容词'结构
examples: He's a very good man.、It is a very beautiful place.、It's a very nice town.
trigger_lemmas: a very good、a very nice、a very beautiful、a very important
keywords: 不定冠词,程度副词,形容词,名词短语,基本描述

content: Guideword: FORM: 'A' + ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use 'a' and 'an' before adjectives in a noun phrase. ► adjectives ►  noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 冠词'a/an'与形容词的搭配：名词短语中的基本用法
examples: You can make a quick snack, for example a sandwich.、We have a big garden and a small swimming pool.、I like it because it is an interesting place.、It's an old house, about 50 years old.
keywords: 冠词,形容词,名词短语,元音音素,单数可数名词

content: Guideword: FORM: PREPOSITION + 'THE' + NOUN. CanDo: Can use 'the' in prepositional phrases relating to time.
chinese_human_name: 介词短语中的定冠词'the'：时间表达
examples: I work at the weekend and I'm very busy from Monday to Friday.、I can come to see you on Friday in the morning.
trigger_lemmas: at the weekend、in the morning、in the afternoon、in the evening
keywords: 定冠词,介词短语,时间表达,特定时间,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: PREPOSITION + NO ARTICLE. CanDo: Can use no article before a limited range of nouns in some fixed expressions with prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 介词后不加冠词的固定表达
examples: If you are at home, I can come tomorrow.、We are going to the sports centre by car.、I go to college every day.
keywords: 介词,冠词,固定表达,地点,交通方式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NO ARTICLE. CanDo: Can use no article before a limited range of singular, plural and uncountable nouns when referring to things in general.
chinese_human_name: 零冠词用法：泛指事物时不加冠词
examples: In my free time I usually play football.、In my free time usually I stay at home. I watch TV, read books…、I like rice and sweet dishes.
trigger_lemmas: play football、watch tv、like rice、stay at home
keywords: 零冠词,泛指,不可数名词,一般性陈述,日常活动

content: Guideword: USE: 'THIS', POINTING. CanDo: Can use 'this' in a limited range of contexts to refer to places from the speaker's or writer's point of view. ► noun phrases ►  pronouns: demonstrative
chinese_human_name: 指示代词'this'：近距离指代用法
examples: I want to let you know about this area and the shops near here.、The football class and tennis class are the best things about this college.、I like this place because there are many cultures.
trigger_lemmas: this area、this place、this college、let you know about this
keywords: 指示代词,近距离指代,单数形式,说话者视角,地点描述

content: Guideword: USE: 'THIS', FUTURE. CanDo: Can use 'this' with time and date words to refer to 'the one that's coming'.
chinese_human_name: 指示词'this'表示未来时间：this + 时间词
examples: … this summer I want to spend my holiday in my country, Bulgaria.、I have a good plan for this weekend.、I'll call you this evening.
keywords: 指示词,未来时间,时间表达,this搭配,时间指向

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THIS' WITH SINGULAR NOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'this' with singular nouns. ► noun phrases ►  pronouns: demonstrative
chinese_human_name: 指示代词this：与单数名词搭配使用
examples: I like this place because is very nice and quiet.、If you like, then we can go this Saturday.
keywords: 指示代词,单数名词,this,近距离指代,时间搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH NOUNS. CanDo: Can use possessive determiners 'my', 'your', 'his', 'her' and 'our' before nouns. ► noun phrases ► possessive pronouns
chinese_human_name: A1级物主限定词：my, your, his, her, our 与名词搭配
examples: I live with my family. My home is a flat.、… my neighbours are very nice and helpful.、I like my teachers.、I live with my mother and her boyfriend.、Our house has four rooms, one bathroom and one toilet.
trigger_lemmas: my family、your name、his car、her phone、our house
keywords: 物主限定词,所属关系,名词短语,人称对应,固定位置

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH PLURAL NOUNS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of quantifying determiners with plural nouns ('some', 'lots of', 'a lot of' and numbers).
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词与复数名词搭配：some, lots of, a lot of及数字
examples: Near my home there are some shops.、My house has got three rooms.、I had a lot of friends in this town.、For homework we have to write lots of things.
keywords: 数量限定词,复数名词,some,lots of,a lot of,数字

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH SINGULAR NOUNS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of quantifying determiners with singular nouns ('a', 'every').► determiners: articles
chinese_human_name: 限定词：单数名词前的数量限定词（a, every）
examples: In my home are 3 bedrooms. I have a big kitchen and small toilet.、The first floor has two bedrooms and a big bathroom with a bath.、I go to India every year to see my friends and family.、I go to college every day.
keywords: 限定词,单数名词,a,every,数量表达

content: Guideword: FORM: PHRASE + PHRASE. CanDo: Can use single word conjunctions ('and, but, or') to combine phrases.
chinese_human_name: 基础并列连词：and, but, or 连接短语
examples: My home is very light and very comfortable.、I live with my mother and her boyfriend.、My house is small but very nice.、She likes to go to the cinema or to the theatre.
trigger_lemmas: and、but、or、very light and very comfortable、go to the cinema or to the theatre
keywords: 并列连词,coordinating conjunctions,and,but,or,短语连接,语法一致性

content: Guideword: FORM: SENTENCE + SENTENCE. CanDo: Can use single word conjunctions ('and, but, or') to combine sentences.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：and, but, or 连接句子
examples: I like it because there are lots of shops, it is not too busy and there is lots of parking. And I like my home because it's not too big and it's a very nice flat.、I am from Estonia. Estonia it is a small country near the Baltic Sea. But now I live in Dorchester, because I work here.、I go shopping on Ladypool Road. Or sometimes I go to my local shop.
keywords: 并列连词,句子连接,and,but,or,复合句

content: Guideword: USE: LISTING. CanDo: Can use 'and' and 'or' before the final item in a list.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：用and和or列举事物
examples: I like to eat chicken, mushrooms and some vegetables.、I have three rooms; a kitchen, living room, bathroom and toilet.、I go to college every Tuesday, Thursday and Friday morning,、I really like my English course because there are very good students from other countries, for example from Italy, Portugal, China and India.、I like to eat steak, vegetables, potatoes or rice.
keywords: 并列连词,列举,and,or,列表结构

content: Guideword: FORM: CLAUSE + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use single word conjunctions ('and, but, or') to combine clauses.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：and, but, or 连接句子
examples: He is a journalist and he likes everything about cinema.、There are lots of shops in the town and the town is only five minutes away.、I have visited a lot of places, but the best place is Thailand.、I like to eat pasta or pizza, but I'm easy about food, I can eat anything.、We love to go to the cinema, or just sit together and have a laugh.
keywords: 并列连词,and,but,or,句子连接

content: Guideword: FORM: WORD + WORD. CanDo: Can use single word conjunctions ('and, but, or') to connect single nouns and adjectives.
chinese_human_name: 基础连词：and, but, or 连接名词和形容词
examples: I like chicken and rice. I don't like meat and fish.、My street is quiet and friendly.、On Monday and Wednesday I have English and maths.、I like my kitchen, it is small but nice.、I like cheese pizza or chicken.、I like to eat soup, eggs, meat and salad or banana and cheese.
keywords: 连词,并列连词,and,but,or,名词连接,形容词连接

content: Guideword: USE: 'BUT', CONCESSIVE. CanDo: Can use 'but' to add an unexpected contrast.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词BUT：表示意外对比
examples: I really like my home, it is very small but it is very easy to clean.、I like my home, it's small but so comfortable, and the decoration is beautiful.
keywords: 并列连词,意外对比,转折关系,句型结构,让步用法

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BECAUSE'. CanDo: Can use 'because' as a subordinating conjunction to introduce a subordinate clause.
chinese_human_name: 从属连词：because引导原因状语从句
examples: I want a big garden because I have children.、She likes meeting other people because she wants to improve her English.
keywords: 从属连词,原因状语从句,因果关系,复合句,标点使用

content: Guideword: FORM: CLAUSE + CLAUSE, ELLIPTED SUBJECT. CanDo: Can omit the subject in a second main declarative clause when the subject is obvious or the same as the first clause.
chinese_human_name: 并列从句中的主语省略：当主语相同时省略第二个主语
examples: She likes to listen to music and watch TV.、After break we go to the class and play some games or study.、Sometimes I go to the park with my friend and play tennis and football.、I can clean or cook for you.
keywords: 并列从句,主语省略,相同主语,并列连词,简洁表达

content: Guideword: FORM: MAIN CLAUSE + MAIN CLAUSE. CanDo: Can combine two main declarative clauses using co-ordinating conjunctions ('and', 'but', 'or').
chinese_human_name: 并列连词连接主句：and, but, or
examples: I like my college and I like my class.、On Sunday I visit my friends, but I often stay at home and I read books.、I like English lessons but I don't like physics.、I watch television, I read magazines or I sleep.
keywords: 并列连词,主句,复合句,and,but,or,连接结构

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE DECLARATIVE. CanDo: Can form simple affirmative declarative clauses.
chinese_human_name: 肯定陈述句：简单肯定句的构成
examples: I study English at college.、My friend is a nurse.、I'm living in Manchester.、It's very cheap and you can buy all you need.、He is very nice but sometimes he is a little crazy.
trigger_lemmas: i study、my friend is、i'm living、it's very cheap、he is very nice
keywords: 肯定陈述句,主语,谓语,宾语,连词

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE DECLARATIVE WITH 'BE'. CanDo: Can form a simple negative declarative clause with lexical 'be' + 'not' or 'n't'.
chinese_human_name: 使用be动词的否定陈述句：be + not/n't
examples: My college is not very big.、This place isn't big.、I'm not bad.
keywords: be动词,否定句,not,n't,陈述句

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE DECLARATIVE, LEXICAL VERBS. CanDo: Can form simple negative declarative clauses.
chinese_human_name: 简单否定陈述句：使用助动词don't的否定表达
examples: I don't like maths.、I don't have children.、I don't know.
keywords: 否定陈述句,don't,doesn't,动词原形,助动词

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE DECLARATIVE, MODAL AUXILIARY VERBS. CanDo: Can form an affirmative declarative clause with modal verbs.
chinese_human_name: 肯定陈述句：情态动词的用法
examples: I can go to see her tomorrow.、I will visit you soon.
keywords: 肯定陈述句,情态动词,动词原形,句型结构,can/will

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE INTERROGATIVE, WITH 'BE'. CanDo: Can form interrogative clauses with 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 使用be动词构成一般疑问句
examples: How are you?、Are you ok?
trigger_lemmas: how are you、are you ok、is it、am i
keywords: be动词,一般疑问句,词序,am is are,问候

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'BECAUSE', REASONS. CanDo: Can use a finite subordinate clause with 'because', after a main clause, to introduce reasons.
chinese_human_name: 从属连词because引导原因状语从句
examples: I love her because she is friendly.、I like my television because it is big and modern.
keywords: 从属连词,原因状语从句,因果关系,主从句结构,because引导

content: Guideword: USE: TIME. CanDo: Can use 'soon' in the phrases 'See you soon' and 'Get well soon', as a signing-off device.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 告别语中的时间副词：soon在See you soon和Get well soon中的用法
examples: Take care. See you soon.、Get well soon.
keywords: soon,See you soon,Get well soon,时间副词,告别语

content: Guideword: USE: PLACE. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs ('here', 'there') to indicate place.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 地点副词：here和there的基本用法
examples: My girlfriend is here with me.、I was born there and I lived there over twenty years.、I go there every year with my friends.
keywords: 地点副词,here,there,位置描述,方向指示

content: Guideword: USE: DEGREE WITH VERBS. CanDo: Can use 'really' and 'very much' with verbs expressing preference ('like', 'love'), for emphasis.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 程度副词强化偏好动词：really和very much的用法
examples: I really like theatre and a classical music.、I really love my space!、I like my garden very much.
trigger_lemmas: really like、really love、like very much、love very much
keywords: 程度副词,偏好动词,强调语气,really,very much,like,love

content: Guideword: USE: 'VERY' WITH ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use 'very' to make adjectives stronger.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 程度副词'very'与形容词的搭配使用
examples: He's a very good man.、I'm very happy in my home.
keywords: 程度副词,形容词修饰,very,加强语气,词序

content: Guideword: USE: FREQUENCY. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs ('always', 'sometimes') to talk about frequency.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 频率副词：always和sometimes的基本用法
examples: I like Dorchester's people, they are always very friendly and polite.、I always see Safora because she lives near my home.、Sometimes I go to the beach.
keywords: 频率副词,always,sometimes,词序,日常表达

content: Guideword: FORM: 'VERY' + ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use 'very' to modify common gradable adjectives.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词'very'修饰形容词：表达强烈程度
examples: My home is very nice.、My teacher is very good.
keywords: 程度副词,可分级形容词,修饰语,加强语气,very good

content: Guideword: FORM: 'VERY' + TIME ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'very' to modify time adverbs. ► adverb phrases
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 副词修饰时间副词：用'very'加强时间副词
examples: I hope you get well very soon.、I don't like it at college when I have a lesson very early.
keywords: very,时间副词,副词短语,修饰语,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: PLACE, COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can use place adverbs ('here', 'there') as complements of verbs.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 地点副词作动词补语：here和there的用法
examples: I am happy here because people are very nice.、I hope you will be there.、You must go there.
keywords: 地点副词,动词补语,here,there,位置关系

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE and TIME, MODIFYING VERBS. CanDo: Can use degree and time adverbs to modify verbs.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词和时间副词修饰动词：really, very much, always, sometimes
examples: I really like Japanese music.、I like my college very much.、I always go to the park with my children. We sometimes go to the shopping centre.
keywords: 程度副词,时间副词,修饰动词,really,very much,always,sometimes

content: Guideword: FORM: FRONT POSITION. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs in front position.
chinese_human_name: 副词前置用法：sometimes, maybe等副词放在句首
examples: Sometimes I go to the beach.、I like writing and speaking but sometimes I like listening.、You can bring some music . Maybe we can dance.
keywords: 副词前置,句首位置,频率副词,态度副词,逗号使用

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, BEFORE ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use a limited range of degree adverbs before an adjective.
chinese_human_name: 程度副词在形容词前的用法：very, really等
examples: My home is very light and very comfortable.、I have a really good friend, her name is Dylma.
keywords: 程度副词,形容词,very,really,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: FREQUENCY, MID POSITION. CanDo: Can use frequency adverbs in the usual mid position, between the subject and the main verb.
chinese_human_name: 频率副词在句中位置：主语与主要动词之间
examples: In my free time I always listen to music, watch TV, clean my room ...、She sometimes goes to the cinema and to the disco.
keywords: 频率副词,句中位置,主语,主要动词,助动词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'REALLY,'  MID POSITION. CanDo: Can use 'really' in the usual mid-position, between the subject and the main verb.
chinese_human_name: 副词'really'的中位用法：主语与主要动词之间
examples: I really love walking.、I really like my kitchen, because it is big.
keywords: 副词,really,中位位置,强调,主语动词之间

content: Guideword: FORM: TIME, END POSITION. CanDo: Can use time adverbs in the usual end position.
chinese_human_name: 时间副词在句末位置的基本用法
examples: Get well soon.、I hope to see you soon.、… because I not working also I will wake up late .
trigger_lemmas: get well soon、see you soon、wake up late
keywords: 时间副词,句末位置,soon,tomorrow,yesterday

content: Guideword: FORM: PLACE, END POSITION. CanDo: Can use place adverbs in the usual end position.
chinese_human_name: 地点副词：句末位置的基本用法
examples: I have many friends there.、I like this place because my parents live there.
keywords: 地点副词,句末位置,there,here,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: 'VERY' + ADVERB. CanDo: Can modify adverbs of time and degree with 'very'.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词短语结构：用'very'修饰程度和时间副词
examples: I hope you will be fine very soon.、I like my job very much.

content: Guideword: FORM: COMBINING TWO ADJECTIVES WITH 'AND'. CanDo: Can use 'and' to join a limited range of common adjectives.

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'VERY'. CanDo: Can use 'very' with a limited range of common gradable adjectives.
